overall.description: A cinematic aerial sequence from Assassin's Creed Origins following the eagle Senu as it soars over ancient Alexandria. The bird explores a grand temple complex before flying toward the harbor with the Pharos lighthouse visible, then exiting over the city walls to the coastline. The footage showcases high-quality game engine rendering of Greco-Egyptian architecture and Mediterranean lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view of ancient Alexandria's residential district, with the harbor visible in the distance. The eagle flies over terracotta rooftops and a stone bridge, gradually ascending toward the great temple complex that dominates the skyline. The camera maintains a smooth, soaring motion as the temple grows larger in the frame.

eagle circles the temple courtyard revealing panoramic views of the harbor

agents.ego_description: the eagle navigates through the temple architecture, flying between columns and soaring over the ceremonial courtyard

stone statues positioned along the temple roofline and courtyard

open marble-paved courtyard with decorative elements and gardens

segments.scene_description: The eagle explores the grand temple complex, flying between massive stone columns and over the ceremonial courtyard. The architecture features classical Greco-Egyptian design with statues lining the roof. Cypress trees frame the complex as the eagle circles, revealing views of the harbor in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: harbor district with view of the Pharos lighthouse and waterfront buildings

events.description: eagle leaves the temple and flies toward the harbor district
eagle descends slightly toward the waterfront buildings

agents.ego_description: the eagle flies away from the temple toward the harbor, with the lighthouse becoming prominent in the distance

entered.detail: tall stone lighthouse with a burning beacon at the top, visible across the harbor
dense cluster of buildings and docks along the waterfront
multi-story stone buildings with balconies facing the water
ancient sailing vessels with triangular sails in the harbor

segments.scene_description: Departing the temple, the eagle flies over the harbor district where the famous Pharos lighthouse dominates the horizon. The camera passes over waterfront buildings and sailing boats in the harbor, maintaining a steady forward flight with slight descent toward the water level.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal fortifications and beach leading to open sea and desert mountains

events.description: eagle flies over the city walls leaving the urban area for the coastline
eagle banks right to follow the coastline and reveal the desert landscape

agents.ego_description: the eagle flies over the outer fortifications and exits the city, soaring along the coastline with desert mountains visible in the background

entered.detail: massive stone fortification walls marking the city boundary
sandy beach along the shoreline with gentle waves
expansive blue Mediterranean water extending to the horizon
arid rocky mountains and desert terrain beyond the city

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the eagle leaving the city by flying over the massive outer walls, transitioning from urban architecture to natural coastal landscape. The camera follows the coastline where sandy beaches meet the open sea, with arid desert mountains rising in the background, showcasing the contrast between the built environment and the natural world.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide from the residential heart of ancient Alexandria toward the imposing heights of a grand temple complex. It begins by soaring over terracotta rooftops and a stone bridge, with the distant harbor providing a backdrop as the camera gradually ascends. As the eagle climbs, the residential district recedes and the skyline is dominated by the massive scale of the temple. The scene then shifts into the heart of the complex, weaving between towering stone columns and gliding over a ceremonial courtyard lined with classical statues. Finally, the camera circles through framing cypress trees, expanding the view to reveal the sprawling architecture against the distant horizon of the harbor.

The shot follows a continuous aerial trajectory that transitions from the dense urban architecture of a harbor district to the expansive openness of a natural coastline. It begins by departing a temple and gliding over the harbor district, where the towering Pharos lighthouse dominates the horizon as the camera descends toward waterfront buildings and sailing boats. As the flight continues, the scene shifts from the bustling port toward the city's perimeter, passing over massive outer walls that mark the boundary of the urban environment. The camera then breaks away from the city entirely, following the coastline where sandy beaches meet the open sea. Finally, the view expands to reveal arid desert mountains rising in the background, contrasting the structured city with the raw Mediterranean landscape.
